name: Sweet and Salty Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: Sugar substitute equivalent to 1 tb sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the pretzel sticks and peanuts.
2. Pour the melted margarine (or butter) over the mixture; sprinkle with sugar substitute.
3. Gently toss to coat.
4. Add air-popped popcorn, bear-shaped crackers, raisins, and cinnamon. Toss gently.
5. Store in an airtight container. Makes 9 servings (1 cup each).
